description: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks to the achievement of objectives to acceptable levels.

subcriteria.name: risk_control_mapping
subcriteria.reference_text: Risk-control matrix mapping identified risks to specific controls that mitigate them. Each risk has one or more assigned controls. Gaps identified when risks lack adequate controls. New controls implemented through the change management process.

subcriteria.name: control_design
subcriteria.reference_text: Controls include a mix of preventive and detective, manual and automated. Automated controls include system-enforced access restrictions, automated alerting, and CI/CD pipeline gates. Manual controls include reviews, approvals, and reconciliations.

subcriteria.name: segregation_of_duties
subcriteria.reference_text: Segregation of incompatible duties enforced through system controls. Developers cannot approve their own pull requests or deploy to production. Financial transactions require dual approval. Access administration separated from access audit.

mismatch_signals.reason: Incident response is a specific control, not the selection process.
Data lifecycle is a specific control, not the selection process.
